creator: rea@FreeBSD.org
text:
HTE 2.0.19 is out [1].

[1] http://hte.sourceforge.net/

Fix: 

The patch is available at
  http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/hte/update-to-2.0.19.diff
Tinderbox builds are OK, my local testing weren't revealed any problems.
QA page: http://codelabs.ru/fbsd/ports/qa/editors/hte/2.0.19
How-To-Repeat: 
Look at [1]
